bookSourceComment:
m.bqglll.cc 笔趣阁镜像书源
搜索: /user/hm.html + /user/search.html
目录/正文: apibi.cc + AES(token)
密钥材料: MD5("book@token.html") 前16=IV 后16=KEY
AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding
2026-07-14
注意: 站点含大量低质/成人向内容，请自行甄别使用
exploreUrl: [{"title":"玄幻奇幻","url":"/xuanhuan/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"武侠仙侠","url":"/wuxia/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"都市言情","url":"/dushi/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"历史军事","url":"/lishi/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"网游竞技","url":"/wangyou/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"科幻灵异","url":"/kehuan/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"女生频道","url":"/mm/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"完本小说","url":"/finish/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}}]
header: {"User-Agent":"Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; Pixel 7) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36","Accept-Language":"zh-CN,zh;q=0.9","Referer":"https://m.bqglll.cc/"}

ruleBookInfo.author: meta[property="og:novel:author"]@content||class.dd_box.0@tag.span.0@text##作者：
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
function aesToken(obj){
  var md5 = String(java.md5Encode('book@token.html'));
  var iv = md5.substring(0,16);
  var key = md5.substring(16,32);
  return String(java.aesEncodeToBase64String(JSON.stringify(obj), key, 'AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding', iv));
}
var html = result;
var m = html.match(/addBookCase\('(\d+)'\)/) || html.match(/bookimg\/\d+\/(\d+)\.jpg/);
if(m){
  var bid = m[1];
  java.put('bid', bid);
  book.variable = JSON.stringify({bid:bid});
}
result = html;
</js>
ruleBookInfo.name: meta[property="og:novel:book_name"]@content||class.name@text

ruleToc.chapterList: function aesToken(obj){ var md5 = String(java.md5Encode('book@token.html')); var iv = md5.substring(0,16); var key = md5.substring(16,32); return String(java.aesEncodeToBase64String(JSON.stringify(obj), key, 'AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding', iv)); } function getBid(){ var bid = java.get('bid'); if(bid) return String(bid); if(book.variable){ try{ bid = JSON.parse(String(book.variable)).bid; if(bid) return String(bid);}catch(e){} } var html = java.ajax(book.bookUrl); var m = String(html).match(/addBookCase\('(\d+)'\)/) || String(html).match(/bookimg\/\d+\/(\d+)\.jpg/); if(m){ java.put('bid', m[1]); book.variable = JSON.stringify({bid:m[1]}); return m[1]; } throw '未解析到书籍ID(bid)'; } var bid = getBid(); var api = 'https://apibi.cc/api/booklist?token=' + encodeURIComponent(aesToken({id:String(bid)})); var data = JSON.parse(java.ajax(api)); var list = data.list || []; var html = ''; for(var i=0;i' + list[i] + '\n'; } result = html; @css:a
